title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Skill Brief: Script Design
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext script design increment in a progressively disclosed skill package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding.
Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

steps.title: Predict Script Design
steps.instruction:
Use a changed theory case derived from this module: agent ext progressive disclosure. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed theory case derived from this module: agent ext progressive disclosure. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. Before reading, predict which action preserves the Script Design contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding.

content.text: Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Check preconditions, perform the operation in an inspectable order, then verify the result and a boundary case.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: agent ext progressive disclosure. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Script Design, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a progressively disclosed skill package.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Scripts should replace agent judgment in ambiguous decisions. This fails the Script Design contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

steps.title: Build Script Design evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-script-design-xgf04v: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Script Design into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-script-design-xgf04v:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

steps.title: Defend the Script Design model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Script Design applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use deterministic scripts for repeatable validation, extraction, or scaffolding.
